_publications._publicationTitle: An inflammatory gene signature distinguishes neurofibroma Schwann cells and macrophages from cells in the normal peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: we tested if an anti-CSF1 function-blocking antibody might reduce macrophage migration stimulated by neurofibroma SC conditioned medium. Indeed, in 3 experiments a significant decrease was observed ( Fig. 6d–f , p < 0.036)
details: Function-blocking antibody significantly decreased macrophage migration stimulated by neurofibroma SC conditioned medium (p < 0.036) in 3 experiments
